creator: martinp@tildeslash.com
text:
diff -ruN monit/Makefile monit-new/Makefile
--- monit/Makefile	2010-11-20 23:19:53.000000000 +0100
+++ monit-new/Makefile	2011-02-23 11:31:45.000000000 +0100
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	monit
-PORTVERSION=	5.2.3
+PORTVERSION=	5.2.4
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mmonit.com/monit/dist/
 
diff -ruN monit/distinfo monit-new/distinfo
--- monit/distinfo	2010-11-20 23:19:53.000000000 +0100
+++ monit-new/distinfo	2011-02-23 11:31:52.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (monit-5.2.3.tar.gz) = 920f50e752cbdc8e2c7f009e1c54bfd46f5646ea22bbab96c58eb5d1a19a0d8c
-SIZE (monit-5.2.3.tar.gz) = 618139
+SHA256 (monit-5.2.4.tar.gz) = feabdd2c0e3263eadaf5359841b92a9e6d4824819b1df7b2b49d9727a849b4cf
+SIZE (monit-5.2.4.tar.gz) = 609225
